name: GENTEX CORP
business: Gentex Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, markets, and supplies digital vision, connected car, premium audio, dimmable glass, fire protection technologies, medical devices, and consumer electronics. Its largest segment is interior and exterior automatic-dimming automotive rearview mirrors using proprietary electrochromic technology. The company ships products to all major automotive producing regions worldwide.
sellsTo: Aviation aircraft manufacturers and airline operators
Fire protection and security product distributors
Retailers for consumer and smart home products
Direct to consumers for medical devices

exposures.sentence: The technology acquired from eSight provides advanced and versatile low-vision smart glasses for those with visual impairments and is compatible with more than 20 eye conditions including Macular Degeneration, Diabetic Retinopathy, and Stargardt disease.
The Company continues to manufacture and sell variable dimmable windows for the passenger compartment on the Boeing 787 Dreamliner series of aircraft.
The Company announced the introduction of a suite of smart home safety products with room-specific functionality called PLACE.
The Company's Full Display Mirror ('FDM'), which is an on-demand, mirror-borne LCD display that streams live, panoramic video of the vehicle's rearward view in order to improve driver rear vision.

The Company designs, develops, manufactures and markets interior and exterior automatic-dimming automotive rearview mirrors that utilize proprietary electrochromic technology to dim in proportion to the amount of headlight glare from trailing vehicle headlamps.

BioCenturion specializes in creating and deploying authentication solutions to help clients secure their worlds, optimize their workload, and organize their data through customized biometric solutions.

The Company's premium audio products include premium loudspeakers, architectural speakers, commercial and cinema speakers, outdoor speakers, wireless and Bluetooth speakers, A/V receivers, high performance 2 channel loudspeakers and electronics, high performance party speakers, home theater systems, business and streaming music systems, soundbars, and Bluetooth headphones and earbuds.

catalysts.event: Shipments of PLACE smart home product line began
catalysts.sentence: Shipments of the Company's PLACE product line began during the second quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of VOXX International Corporation completed
catalysts.sentence: On April 1, 2025, the Company acquired all of the issued and outstanding shares of VOXX common stock not already owned by the Company for a purchase price of $7.50 per share, resulting in VOXX becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company for cash consideration totaling $148.3 million.
On July 1, 2025, the Company, in the ordinary course of business, completed its acquisition of BioConnect Inc.
